This tier list is specifically for Dream Dive. Perhaps because players think that the full score is pretty easy to achieve, teams that can take fewer turns or don't need specific Relics will be rated higher. But in fact, as someone said, the teams above are all very good.

ssr :Giant's Blade /A Most Precious Collection /Lost Path
But 2 ssr are too expensive (one of them must reach e15), so I suggest you just use his ssr and sr wheel.
Should I attempt to pull 2 more Ryker dupes?
e3 is useful, but e7 is too powerful and important, whether in terms of attack orientation or support. But it’s too expensive, so I recommend e1 or e7.
E3 it is, then signature wheel
The event's SR wheel must be fully purchased

romona,ogier,doll,ryker
There are many teams but all have limited-time characters, so I recommend this team first.
But I don't know how he performs at lower levels.
